title: Sexual Selection in Peacocks
script_summary: Dive into the intriguing world of sexual selection in peacocks with clear science.

segments.voiceover: Why do peacocks flaunt those stunning tails?
It all comes down to sexual selection—a process where mates are chosen based on traits.
But it's not just about beauty. Those tails signal health and vitality.
Research shows females prefer males with larger, brighter tails. More tail, more mates!
But remember, not every trait guarantees success. Nature's complex!
Like what you learned? Hit subscribe for more fascinating science!
